subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf of the Divine Kingdom! The letter thou didst address to Áqá Mírzá Ṣubḥí hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه رحمانیه نامه ای که باقا میرزا صبحی مرقوم نموده بودی مسموع شد
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
